procedure:
Supply power to the functional block.
Wait for power to stabilize.
Set device to measure mode waiting for a start adc command.
Connect a voltage of 1V to NTC and ground connections (JP2 pin 1 and 2).
Send command to start temperature reading.
Read temperature sensor 1.
expected_output: ["Includes criteria: temperature measurement voltage is equal to input voltage ±10mV"]

procedure:
Supply power to the functional block.
Wait for power to stabilize.
Connect a resistance of 50 ohms to the adc input.
Read the data from the adc.
Connect a resistance of 200 ohms to the adc input.
Read the data from the adc.
Connect a resistance of 350 ohms to the adc input.
Read the data from the adc
expected_output: ["Includes criteria: data ready pin transitions to logic low when there is new data to read", "Includes criteria: all measured values are within 0.5% of input resistance"]

procedure:
Supply power to the funcitonal block with an input voltage of 60V.
Wait for power to stabilize.
Connect an eload to the output and set to 500mA load.
Measure output voltage.
Increase the voltage to 75V.
Wait for power to stabilize.
Measure output voltage.
Reduce input voltage to 60V.
Wait for power to stabilize.
Measure output voltage
expected_output: ["Includes criteria: When input voltage is 60V, output voltage is = 60V ± 0.1V", "Includes criteria: When the input voltage is 75V, output voltage is < 70V"]

goal: Verify output voltage at a range of loads
procedure:
Supply power to the functional block.
Wait for power to stabilize.
Measure the output voltage with no load.
Connect an eload to the output and set to nominal load (300mA).
Measure the output voltage.
Set the eload to max current (1A).
Measure the output voltage.

Supply power to the functional block.
Wait for power to stabilize.
Inject a pulse 100V, lasting for 10us, between CANH_BUS and CANL_BUS through a resistance of 100 ohms.
Measure voltage at connector.
expected_output: ["Includes criteria: voltage at the connector never rises above 40V"]

procedure:
Power on the functional block with an input voltage of 6V.
Wait for power to stabilize.
Measure the output voltage.
Increase input voltage to 8V.
Measure the output voltage.
expected_output: ["Includes criteria: output voltage is <0.5V when the input is 6V", "Includes criteria: output voltage is 5V ±1% when the input is 8V"]

procedure:
Supply power to the functional block.
Wait for power to stabilize.
Place pcb on a flat surface with the accelerometer pointing up.
Configure accelerometer range ±2g.
Read acccelerometer data.
expected_output: ["Includes criteria: x and y measurements are 0g ±0.1", "Includes criteria: z measurement is 1g ±0.1"]

procedure:
Supply power to the functional block.
Wait for power to stabilize.
Inject a 1 MHz square wave from 0-3.3V on CAN_TX.
Measure the differential voltage between CANH_BUS and CANL_BUS.
expected_output: ["Includes criteria: a differential square wave with minimum (recessive) voltage in the range [-50, +50] mV", "Includes criteria: a differential square wave with maximum (dominant) voltage in the range [1.5, 3.0] V, with CANH_BUS > CANL_BUS", "Includes criteria: rise and fall time of signals is <= 45ns", "Includes criteria: square wave frequency of 1MHz"]

procedure:
Supply power to the functional block.
Wait for power to stabilize.
Set device to measure mode waiting for a start adc command.
Connect a voltage source of 3.6V between CELL0 and CELL1 (JP1 pins 1 and 2).
Send command to start cell measurements.
Read cell voltages.
Repeat test with the power supply connected to each pair of adjacent cell inputs (i.e. CELL1 and CELL2, CELL2 and CELL3, ...).
expected_output: ["Includes criteria: powered cell voltage is 3.6V ±10mV", "Includes criteria: all other cell voltages are 0V±10mV"]

goal: Verify output voltage at a range of input voltages
procedure:
Power on the functional block with low input voltage (7V).
Wait for power to stabilize.
Connect an eload to the output and set to nominal load (100mA).
Measure the output voltage.
Change the input voltage to nominal voltage (12V).
Wait for power to stabilize
Measure the output voltage.
Change the input voltage to high voltage (17V).
Wait for power to stabilize
Measure the output voltage.

goal: Verify output voltage at a range of loads
procedure:
Supply power to the functional block.
Wait for power to stabilize.
Measure the output voltage with no load.
Connect an eload to the output and set to nominal load (100mA).
Measure the output voltage.
Set the eload to max current (500mA).
Measure the output voltage.
